docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LYE, TRINI AS TO DEFENDANT MA, RUTH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-23-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYE, TRINI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $110.00 SERVED JAN-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MA, RUTH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYE, TRINI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MA, RUTH THE ROOTS FROM DEFENDANT'S REDWOOD TREE LIKELY INTRUDED PLAINTIFF'S SEWER PIPES BECAUSE, AS PLAINTIFF'S PLUMBER EXPLAINS, THEY WERE OLD AND BROKEN 4 "CLAY PIPES." THE ROOT INTRUSION LIKELY RESULTED FROM THE DECAYED CONDITION OF THE DEFENDANT'S SEWER PIPE RATHER THAN THE PROXIMITY OF THE PIPE TO DEFENDANT'S TREE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-23-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-23-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTFF TRINI LYE IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MERRI PONTAR RAWSKI, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT RUTH MA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.
